name: @stackra/decorators
purpose: Centralised decorator library — generic factories for class/method/property metadata, plus domain wrappers (@DevtoolsPanel, @OnEvent, @Cacheable, @Route).
capabilities: Generic factories for class / method / property decorators
Per-consumer subpaths (core, devtools, logger, events, cache, queue, routing)
Metadata stamping decoupled from runtime loaders
Feature packages stay decoupled from loader implementations
when_to_use: You are shipping a package that discovers contributors via metadata and want the decorator surface to live in one place.
when_not_to_use: For plain method wrapping without metadata use function composition; for lifecycle hooks use @stackra/container directly.
